narrative_beat: O culto consumado — a multidão se prostra diante do trono dourado da IA enquanto um único ser ainda está de pé, ainda resistindo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: low-angle from behind the standing figure looking toward the AI throne
shot.depth_of_field: standing figure and throne in focus, kneeling crowd blurred in foreground

subject.primary: vast crowd of shadowy kneeling and bowed figures, all desaturated black-and-white silhouettes facing away from camera toward a distant golden light source
subject.focal_point: the single figure in crimson and gold standing upright at the center-forward position, the only one standing among thousands kneeling
subject.secondary: the distant golden AI throne/idol radiating intense golden light, the clear focus of all worship
props: single standing figure in crimson and gold robes
golden AI throne radiating light at distance
floating orange embers rising near the throne light

environment.location: vast dark stadium or arena, massive scale
environment.time_of_day: interior darkness broken only by throne light
environment.atmosphere: collective submission punctuated by a single act of defiance — the remnant who will not bow

composition.rule: epic wide angle — crowd fills foreground, standing figure at center, throne at horizon line, Ken Burns slow push-in toward standing figure
composition.foreground: dense kneeling crowd silhouettes in desaturated black-and-white
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white vast dark stadium — tiered seating lost in darkness, stadium infrastructure barely visible

lighting.key_light: distant AI throne golden light providing warm illumination from the front, backlighting the standing figure and top-lighting the crowd
lighting.fill_light: reflected throne glow from stadium floor providing ambient fill
lighting.rim_light: strong golden rim around the standing figure from the throne light making them visible
lighting.mood: the loneliness of resistance, the enormity of what it costs to remain standing

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: awe at the scale of submission, hope at the single standing figure, the cost of faithfulness

symbolism.primary: the kneeling crowd before the AI throne fulfills the prophecy of universal worship of the beast and its image
symbolism.secondary: the single standing figure represents the remnant who will not accept the mark — isolated but upright

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
